title: PHRINUSOMYIS Announces Tatiana Manaois
description: PHRINUSOMYIS proudly announces the international debut of Tatiana Manaois, a world-class singer and performer, at our West Africa stage. Join us for an unforgettable experience with her powerful performance. International Debut: June 26, 2026 (West Africa). Stay tuned for exclusive content, tickets, and behind-the-scenes access.
